Restaurants in Historic Sanford

50%Grade A
4.3Avg rating
12Restaurants

Historic Sanford is a dining district in Seminole County, Central Florida. Explore its 12 restaurants below with health inspection grades, dietary options, and diner ratings — 6 currently hold an A health grade.
